description_long: This is a multi-story apartment building complex with a red-tiled gable roof and pale yellow exterior walls. The structure features multiple balconies with railings, symmetrically arranged windows, and a prominent main building connected to a smaller wing. The property is surrounded by a low white wall and includes a landscaped yard with trimmed hedges, several trees, and a rectangular garden plot. There is a small outbuilding with a matching red-tiled roof adjacent to the main structure, likely serving as a garage or storage. A paved pathway and a blue cylindrical water tank are also visible within the grounds, enhancing the residential character.
description: A pale yellow, multi-story apartment building with red-tiled roofs, balconies, and a landscaped yard featuring hedges, trees, and a garden plot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, garden plot, outbuilding, and landscaped hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat facade of the main building, window arrangement, and the outbuilding's roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the balconies, water tank, and the full extent of the garden plot.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, balconies, and the garden area bordered by hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, evenly spaced across the facade and grouped by floor, contributing to a balanced and orderly appearance.
